params.name: Edison's Phonograph
params.source:
* Fragment Crafting (1.6%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF), Wishing (0.14%)
* [[Indigent Nobleman]] (210k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}})
params.description:
On Apr 11, 1877, Edison invented the world's first gramophone.

A phonograph is an electrical device used to play records by placing the disc on a turntable and letting it rotate under a stylus. Edison shook the crank and sang a song to the phonograph. Afterwards, he shook the crank lightly and the machine actually imitated him and sang "Mary had a little lamb, whose fleece was white as snow..." The first talking machine caused a sensation in the world at that time.
